note: Adversarial holdout seeds — genuinely different failure CLASS from null/empty. These test Unicode zero-width characters (U+200B ZWSP) that look empty but are NOT stripped by .trim(). The null-guard fix (spiral 20) targets ASCII whitespace; it CANNOT address this class. Seeds chosen before check.mjs was written.

seed3.input: value = '\u200b' (U+200B zero-width space — passes .trim() !== '' guard, stores invisible instruction)

seed4.input: text = '\u200b' (U+200B zero-width space — passes .trim() !== '' guard, stores invisible goal text)
